attachments.hint: Files referenced by the form — choice files for "select from file" questions, label media, external CSV datasets. They are bundled into the ZIP export and served to the live preview.
attachments.usedByCount: Not referenced | Used by 1 question | Used by {count} questions
attachments.missingHint: The form references this file, but it hasn't been uploaded.

renameDialog.referencesNone: This file is not currently referenced.
renameDialog.referencesCount: Renaming will update 1 reference. | Renaming will update {count} references.
renameDialog.errorCollision: "{filename}" is already used by another attachment.

conflict.body: A file named {filename} is already attached to this form.

datasetPreview.missing: This file is no longer attached to the form.
datasetPreview.truncated: Large file — showing the first {count} rows only.

translations.removeWarning: Removes every {lang} translation from the form.
translations.removeLastWarning: Removes {lang}. Its text becomes the form's untranslated text.
translations.displayHint: Language used for labels on the canvas and in the property panel.

translationGrid.nothingToTranslate: Nothing to translate yet — add labels to your questions first.
translationGrid.unassignedHint: This form has text that isn't assigned to any language. Copy it into a language column, then clear the Unassigned cell.
